Series B Funding Term Sheet

This non-binding term sheet summarizes the principal terms of the Series B preferred stock financing of Innovate Tech Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 201234567A). The parties intend to negotiate in good faith to execute a Stock Purchase Agreement (the "SPA").

1. **Issuer**: Innovate Tech Pte. Ltd.
2. **Investors**: 
   - Dr. Tan Wei Ming
   - Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah
3. **Amount**: The Company seeks to raise SGD 5,000,000.
4. **Price Per Share**: SGD 10.00 per share.
5. **Contact**: Mr. Ramasamy Muthu, Phone: +65 6123 4567, Email: ramasamy@innovate.sg
6. **NRIC**: Dr. Tan Wei Ming - URL: https://example.sg/user/S2345678J
7. **Use of Proceeds**: The funds will be used for product development, marketing, and operational expansion. The project plan will not include any unapproved changes to the existing project status.
8. **SPA**: The SPA will detail the rights and obligations of the parties involved.

This term sheet is intended for informational purposes only and does not constitute a binding agreement.
